headline: Citigroup Weighs Asia Expansion And US China Role For Future Growth
summary: Citigroup plans to expand its Asia Pacific prime brokerage operations with additional staff across the region. CEO Jane Fraser is set to join a high level US delegation to China for a business summit with President Xi Jinping. The news highlights both an operational push in Asia Pacific and Citigroup's role in US China financial engagement. Citigroup (NYSE:C) is drawing fresh attention as it targets growth in its Asia Pacific prime brokerage franchise while maintaining a visible role in...

headline: FICO to Present Free Credit Education Workshops at Select Citi Branches
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., May 14, 2026--Global analytics software leader, FICO (NYSE:FICO) is hosting a series of free credit education workshops at select Citi branches nationwide through FICO’s Score A Better Future™ (SABF) program. These workshops are designed to empower individuals in traditionally underserved communities with the knowledge and tools to make informed financial decisions and prepare for life milestones, such as renting an apartment, buying a home, owning a business, or advancing educat

headline: CFPB’s Vought defends terminating Citi consent order
summary: “There are no unfulfilled obligations as of the date of termination, and Citi committed to ongoing monitoring regardless of termination,” the CFPB acting director wrote to lawmakers this week.

raw.headline: CFPB’s Vought defends terminating Citi consent order
raw.summary: “There are no unfulfilled obligations as of the date of termination, and Citi committed to ongoing monitoring regardless of termination,” the CFPB acting director wrote to lawmakers this week.

headline: China Appears On Track to Meet 2026 Growth Target
summary: China's GDP growth appears on track to meet its full-year target, reducing the need for sizable stimulus to come, Citi analysts say in a note. They note Beijing seems satisfied with current growth momentum based on its announcements.

headline: Morning Call Sheet: AI optimism and China talks lift markets
summary: Katerina Simonetti, Executive Director at Morgan Stanley Private Wealth, Clare Pleydell-Bouverie, Co-Head of Global Innovation Team at Liontrust Asset Management, and Steve Grasso, CEO of Grasso Global, discuss China talks, AI infrastructure growth, Cisco’s rally and market optimism around the Fed.
